name: Incense
description: Incense sticks burning down in the half-dark, smoke pearls rising off each ember — every redraw lets the smoke drift anew.

code.style: --rule: ( /* stick and ember stand at one emitted height; both smoke pearls share one tone */ --smoke: @p(var(--color2), var(--color2), var(--color1)); --ih: @r(40, 64); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 48%; width: 4%; bottom: 6%; height: calc(@var(--ih) * 1%); border-radius: 99px; background: var(--color1); transition: ease 800ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 48.5%; @size: 5%; bottom: calc(@var(--ih) * 1% + 6%); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color3); box-shadow: calc(@r(-60, -20) * 1px / @Y) calc(-90px / @Y) 0 calc(-2px / @Y) @var(--smoke), calc(@r(10, 60) * 1px / @Y) calc(-190px / @Y) 0 calc(-1px / @Y) @var(--smoke); transition: ease 800ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
